rule_hits.summary: The references section lists academic papers and resources related to deep learning techniques, including backpropagation, adaptive learning rates, autoencoders, and frameworks...
The deep learning computations were performed on a Dell PowerEdge R630 with Ubuntu 14.04 LTS. The dataset consists of over 6 million customers, split 80:20 for training and test...
This abstract discusses the use of deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and autoencoders for churn prediction in telecommunications. The authors represent customer behavior...
The paper titled 'Churn analysis using deep convolutional neural networks and autoencoders' is authored by Artit Wangperawong, Cyrille Brun, Dr. Olav Laudy, and Rujikorn Pavasut...
